summary: Completed comprehensive testing of orthopedic shoe technologist landing page. Backend API fully functional with contact form submission and email integration. Frontend responsive and working correctly. Minor email service limitation in testing environment.

email_limitations.issue: Customer confirmation emails can only be sent to verified email addresses in testing mode
email_limitations.impact: Customer confirmation emails fail for non-verified addresses
email_limitations.note: Business notification emails work correctly. This is expected behavior for Resend testing environment.

design_issues.issue: Navigation links remain visible on mobile instead of being hidden behind hamburger menu
design_issues.note: All navigation links are visible on mobile view, should be collapsed into hamburger menu

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Contact form submission saves to database successfully
Business notification email sent successfully to siegert@orthovdv.be
Form validation working for required fields
Form validation working for invalid email format
Frontend loads correctly on desktop and mobile
Contact form submission and clearing works on frontend
WhatsApp and Call buttons are clickable and functional
Form fields properly responsive on mobile
action_item_for_main_agent: Implement proper mobile hamburger menu to hide navigation links on mobile devices. Currently all navigation links are visible on mobile instead of being collapsed into a hamburger menu.
